subject: Selene Orrel and Rowan Cale
context: Hidden marriage/binding that endangered Selene's inheritance position

subject: Aric Vey
action: Completed usual evening cipher work with Marris, observed amber cordial, heard passage sounds
context: Routine duties with confidential cipher aide; door between rooms was open

subject: citadel
action: Barred the citadel at nightfall; fastenings found still secure in morning; examined barred citadel during investigation
context: Housewarden's nightly security duty; confirmed no forced entry from outside

subject: Aric Vey
action: Found Vey dead; saw Tavia collapse and order the body moved; helped report the murder
context: Body discovered at desk in maproom; Tavia's reaction to finding the body

subject: Pira Senn
action: Went downstairs to seek Tavia's remedy; dressed fully, took loose glow-wick; did not return
context: Last known movement before vanishing; carried glow-wick reportedly due to jawache; previously described as troubled and withdrawn

time: At time of death / Post-mortem examination
subject: Aric Vey
action: Examined Vey's wound, removed the flechette; was seated and leaning forward when struck; ruled out self-infliction
context: Physician's forensic examination; wound trajectory inconsistent with suicide; half-written summons found

location: Cinderglass Armory / locked drawer beside bed in sleep chamber
subject: six-cell spring caster
action: Identified flechette as third-gauge ammunition; inspected weapon, found cells apparently loaded; explained cleaning removed barrel residue while chamber showed recent shot; recovered spring caster and ammunition from locked drawer
context: Weapon matched to Vey's weapon type; appeared operational and loaded; deliberately cleaned but incompletely; normal storage location of murder weapon

location: Various locations including citadel premises, Northmere trail, inquiry proceedings
subject: investigation evidence and leads
action: Found Pira's dropped glow-wick; interpreted Tavia's soot-marked scarf; traced Rowan's movements and Northmere trail; questioned Pira's confession; searched Vey's sleep chamber; helped recover ward-key and torn message fragments; identified Liora Fen as respectable widow; described her household; reported seeing Pira at upper window
context: Physical evidence linking suspects to scene; tracking travel history; authenticity of confession challenged; evidence Tavia had concealed

location: Chamber not belonging to Tavia / Citadel
subject: Tavia Orrel
action: Saw Tavia enter a chamber not her own; observed her handle something near the grate; heard an object fall; saw Tavia leave the maproom area with a paper hidden away; refused to explain the ward-key and torn fragments; admitted destroying or concealing evidence
context: Surveillance operation; suspicious behavior regarding documents; evidence directly related to locked interior and murder circumstances; aim was shielding Selene and protecting family name

subject: investigation methodology
action: Followed Northmere and Liora Fen leads, gathered inn and village information; saw Pira alive shortly before her death; observed the suspicious powder episode; recovered papers, obtained Selene's message to Liora
context: Undercover operative using alias Moth; critical observation establishing Pira was living shortly before death; powder later sent to Pira as protective charm—questionable provenance; physical evidence obtained through covert means

location: Various including Vel Orun, Copper Quay Lodge, Saffron Gate Inn
subject: Rowan Cale / Orrel party
action: Reported on Rowan Cale's past in Vel Orun; documented Cale's travel, correspondence, preparations for a woman, connection with Liora Fen; supplied background on Vey's character, settlement documents, preference for Selene; expressed hostility to Rowan's people; provided information about Rowan's presence, agitation, correspondence, movements, and apparent departure; described the Orrel party's earlier stay, Rowan's presence, messages and interactions, and Selene's and Tavia's behavior during the period when the secret binding was arranged
context: Foreign investigator establishing Cale's background and lineage; corroborating evidence of Cale-Selene-Liora network; senior estate advocate providing context for motives; combined with other Northmere servants' statements

subject: Liora Fen
action: Hid a lacquer tube containing the binding evidence; received Selene's request to destroy the proof; took in Pira after the murder; heard Pira say she had been sent away and warned not to tell what happened
context: Kept proof of Selene-Rowan union secure; Selene sought to eliminate evidence of the union; provided sanctuary to fleeing attendant; Pira's claimed explanation for her flight and silence

time: When approaching the citadel / Various periods
subject: Rowan Cale
action: Revealed Rowan's visits under both a false name and his own; used a borrowed name; described the secret-binding problem to Niko as though it concerned someone else
context: Cale used aliases when visiting the citadel; deliberate identity concealment upon arrival; evasive account masking his own involvement

subject: Pira Senn
action: Confession attributed to her is disputed; appeared to have seen or met someone
context: Due to form, timing, and surrounding circumstances; after the killing occurred

subject: Aric Vey / Binding proof
action: The household knew of Vey's spring caster; meant to summon his legal steward and alter his settlement after learning the truth about Selene's binding to Rowan; requested destruction of binding proof
context: Weapon was known to staff though not necessarily its location; why Selene's secret binding would threaten inheritance and trigger legal response; effort to eliminate evidence of the forbidden union
